text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And now's time for the best part of summer camp,
ghost stories! First one to get the heebie-jeebies
is the loser!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's with the silent treatment?! You're
creepin' me out just bein' there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez, count me outta this one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the host's sudden departure, only a handful
of quieter Umamusume are left on the moonlit
beach.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Flash... Um, this isn't necessarily a ghost story,
but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Would you mind telling me a little more about
the witch called Leckermaul?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Very well. But bear in mind, this story will
feature several embellishments, so I'm not sure
how useful you'll find it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll endeavor to keep it in line with the original
text—the fairy tale, "Hänsel und Gretel," by the
Brothers Grimm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hansel and Gretel. That's the famous story of the
house that's made of candy...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Following a long famine, times were hard and
children difficult to feed. As such, the siblings
Hansel and Gretel were abandoned in the forest.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This forest was the home of a witch named
Leckermaul. She saved the children's lives, and
brought them into her home. However...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This was all an elaborate plan to fatten the
children up so she could eventually use them as
sustenance.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Every day, Leckermaul ordered Gretel to cook
food for her brother that would plump him up.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The sister cooked, the brother ate, and the witch
gave the orders. Three cogs working in tandem
towards an inevitable conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was all for the purpose of satisfying
Leckermaul's stomach. In other words, Hansel was
being kept alive in order to die.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So that's the kind of witch Leckermaul was...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: All so that she could eat him one day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That young girl feeding her brother food to
fatten him up... I can't help but wonder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Am I playing that role? I struggle to laugh the
story off as just some fairy tale.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Flash... I've seen her... I've seen the witch.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, something like a witch. Although I'm not
really sure whether that's accurate...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well, we could dismiss that as a
hallucination, but I'm not too fond of that
explanation.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even if your mind was playing tricks on you, that
was something you perceived. If you truly feel
that you saw it, then...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There may be an underlying reason why you're
seeing it. For example...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It might be... something akin to the Witch's
Blood. It's a bloodline tracing back to the
German forest, but if even a few drops of that
blood are coursing through your body...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The Witch's... Blood...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That's the source of the influence...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And if the Witch's Blood is behind it all... I'll end
up... a sacrifice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a disturbing story. Whether it's a fairy tale or
not, Manhattan Cafe's morale is on the line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe we really should stop chasing her friend...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um! Sorry to intrude but, I just... wanted to say
something about witches!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Actually, um... not all witches are bad!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The witch who lived in that candy house is a bad
one, but there are plenty of good ones too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Who... oh, it's Zenno Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy is a literature buff. She's
well-versed in all sorts of stories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a gentle smile on her face, she quietly
explains.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A famous good witch would be... the Witch of the
North from "The Wizard of Oz," for example.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
To give a different example from a German fairy
tale, one of the witches that appears in the
original "Sleeping Beauty" saves the princess and
extends her life.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Witches do tend to lure people to various places.
However...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The destination depends entirely on the witch.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well... you have a point. It's better to make
judgments based on an individual's nature than it
is to fall back on stereotypes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The conversation doesn't have anything to do
with specters or ghouls, but it's captivating in its
own right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe stares at Zenno Rob Roy as if
she's being pulled in by a gravitational force...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um, Zenno Rob Roy... Could you...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind telling me your plans for the
fall? Your racing plans, I mean. I don't suppose
you're...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
My racing plans... for the fall? Well, I'm planning
to sign up for...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup. I'm hoping to make a hero of
myself there.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Magical and spellbinding runners will be
gathering from all over the world. I would love to
compete with them.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I knew it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, it's her. I can feel my friend's presence all
around...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She'll be my next rival... There's something she
will impart to me. And after that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Manhattan Cafe's friend has played
some part in her decision to enter the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure whether we're on a path to salvation
or destruction. But our next hurdle has come into
view.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're planning to enter the Japan Cup as well?
In that case, good luck to us both.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Let's make the most of the autumn festival. Or
should I say, the witches' night, Hexennacht.
